passing_score_scale: 1000-6000 (3000 passing for NCA/NCP exams); pass/fail for NCM-MCI lab

testing_centers.notes: In-person test centers and online proctored (OnVUE) available for NCA and NCP exams. NCM-MCI is a live lab exam.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items or notes permitted in the testing area. NCA and NCP exams are multiple-choice via Pearson VUE. NCM-MCI is a hands-on live lab exam (180 minutes, 16-20 scenarios). NCM-MCI requires any non-expired NCP or NCM-level certification as a prerequisite.
renewal_options: Recertify by passing the current version of the exam before expiry. A one-year grace period may be available for recertification.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between attempts. No limit on total attempts.

domains.name: Deploy and Configure an NDB Solution
Monitor Alerts and Storage Usage Within an NDB Implementation
Operate and Maintain an NDB Environment
Protect NDB-managed Databases Using Time Machine

aliases: ncp-db nutanix certified professional - database automation
